error.signature: A RenderFlex overflowed by 42 pixels on the bottom.
error.regex: (RenderFlex overflowed|overflowed by.*pixels|BOTTOM OVERFLOWING|RIGHT OVERFLOWING|RenderBox.*not laid out)

verdict.summary: Widget exceeds available space. Column/Row child too large for the parent constraints.

dead_ends.why_fails: Makes the entire screen scrollable which breaks fixed-position elements and can cause nested scroll issues

dead_ends.action: Set fixed height/width on the overflowing widget
dead_ends.why_fails: Hardcoded sizes break on different screen sizes and orientations

workarounds.action: Wrap overflowing child in Expanded or Flexible
Use ListView instead of Column for scrollable content
workarounds.how: Replace Column with ListView when content may exceed screen height

workarounds.action: Use LayoutBuilder to adapt to available space
